englishDefinitions: A wide area of flat land near the sea that is covered by water at high tide and exposed at low tide.
A coastal wetland that changes with the tides.
persianTranslation: زمین هموار ساحلی که با مد و جزر زیر آب می‌رود
examples: Birds searched for food on the tidal flat.
At low tide, the tidal flat stretched for miles.
Scientists studied the plants and animals living in the tidal flat.
